function issueCredential(bytes32 issuerDID, bytes32 holderDID, uint8 credentialType, string calldata metadataURI) external returns (uint256)
function verifyCredential(uint256 credentialId) external view returns (bool valid, bool expired, bool revoked, bool trustedIssuer)
function getHolderCredentials(bytes32 holderDID) external view returns (uint256[] memory)
function getCredential(uint256 credentialId) external view returns (bytes32 issuerDID, bytes32 holderDID, uint8 credentialType, string memory metadataURI, uint256 issuedAt, bool revoked)
function isTrustedIssuer(bytes32 issuerDID) external view returns (bool)
event CredentialIssued(uint256 indexed credentialId, bytes32 indexed issuerDID, bytes32 indexed holderDID, uint8 credentialType)
